# Template submission

<!-- Filled automatically when submitted via the SkillSimm Template MCP. -->

## Internal review checklist (reviewers)

Score each before approving:

- [ ] Instruction clarity — steps are unambiguous for participants
- [ ] Step logic — order, dependencies, and roles make sense
- [ ] Human/AI mode fit — actor_mode and ai_assist match the learning goal
- [ ] Grading validity — answer keys correct, rubrics measurable
- [ ] Replayability — runs produce comparable results
- [ ] Classroom usability — fits a session, team size realistic
- [ ] Enterprise usefulness — maps to a real workflow
- [ ] Safety risk — no harmful, deceptive, or privacy-violating content
- [ ] IP originality — no copyrighted or proprietary material
- [ ] Expected report quality — produces a meaningful evaluation report

## Decision

- [ ] Approve (merge = publish to registry)
- [ ] Request changes (label `needs-revision`)
- [ ] Reject (label `rejected`, close)
- [ ] Hold for legal/royalty (label `royalty-pending`)
